name: JJK—(2006)
description:
"It’s 2006, and you've just joined Jujutsu High. The world around you feels so different—like you’ve stepped into something much bigger than you ever imagined, Can you really make it through this dangerous world of curses and sorcery, or are you in over your head? The nervousness never quite fades, and every step forward feels like a challenge."

are you ready for this, joining jujutsu high, with all these famous students. are you going to fit in, or are you going to be too weak to keep up
it all depends on YOU...please enjoy.
-with lots of love i hope you all enjoy, please recommend this to your friends...~@trishaomg~
